answer: The current status of SRM Institute of Science and Technology placement statistics for 2025 is as follows: the highest package offered was around INR 65 LPA, with an average package of INR 6.66 LPA (as per studyriserr.com), while the highest package in 2026 stands at INR 60-61 LPA (as per shiksha.com). The placement season recorded a high number of offers, including 4,071 high-paying roles and over 9,488 offers in total. Top companies such as Adobe and Maxlinear participated in the placements.
